edge_legend.TOP_EDGE: Positive PP edge (+1.5+) or strong avg vs soft defense (high rank = weak).
edge_legend.OK_EDGE: PP edge on board or solid production vs average-or-softer defense.
edge_legend.TOP_UNDER: PP edge -2+ vs elite defense, or historically fades vs elite D.
edge_legend.OK_UNDER: Negative PP edge vs elite defense — lean UNDER.
edge_legend.AVOID: Negative PP edge without elite matchup — skip OVER.
